creator: taoka@infonets.hiroshima-u.ac.jp
text:
Ports of 'Wnn4.2' in chinese, japanese and korean are updated. Please
apply this patch in $PORTSDIR.

Note that a file '$PORTSDIR/japanese/Wnn/pkg/REQ is deleted.

S. Taoka
Hiroshima Univ., Japan
